final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: commercial-photography
Asset type: editorial interior shot for medical spa brand brochure and luxury magazine advertisement
Primary request: modern minimalist skin treatment room in high-end medical aesthetics clinic, embodying "technology meets nature" design philosophy
Scene/backdrop: contemporary medical spa treatment room with frosted glass sliding door revealing soft corridor lighting in background, professional environment with clean lines
Subject: ergonomic electric treatment bed with leather upholstery at center, professional LED light therapy device and RF beauty equipment mounted at head, large digital skin analyzer display on wall showing real-time skin analysis data, floor-to-ceiling skincare display cabinet with premium medical-grade products (hyaluronic acid serums, collagen masks, anti-aging ampoules), shadowless surgical lamp and intelligent dimming system on ceiling
Style/medium: commercial interior photography, photorealistic, architectural editorial style
Composition/framing: symmetrical layout emphasizing professionalism and order, balanced perspective shot, medium-wide angle to capture spatial depth
Lighting/mood: soft natural medical-grade clean lighting with gentle shadows, color temperature adjustable smart lighting system, warm and professional atmosphere
Color palette: minimalist white + natural wood tones + subtle green accents from plants, moderate saturation, clean and inviting
Materials/textures: genuine leather bed surface with realistic grain, cold metallic sheen on medical instruments, warm tactile wood elements, frosted glass translucency, premium skincare packaging
Constraints: maintain symmetrical composition, preserve "high-end medical aesthetics" positioning, keep technology-nature balance with green plant accents
Avoid: cluttered composition, harsh shadows, plastic-looking materials, oversaturated colors, watermark, text overlay
